ai_summary: Avenue Supermarts Limited is undertaking a significant restructuring of its senior operational leadership, appointing Mr. Lalit Ahuja as Chief Operating Officer (COO) and re-appointing Mr. Bhaskaran N as Whole-time Director and COO. This creates a dual COO structure, with the previous COO transitioning to a 'Head - Centre of Excellence' role, signaling a major operational overhaul; however, the lack of immediate detail on the distinct responsibilities for the two COOs could introduce temporary ambiguity regarding oversight.
